name: [ - Five Night's At Freddy's 2: 1987 - ]
description:
"Welcome to Freddy Fazbear's pizza: a magical place for kids and grown-ups alike, where fantasy and fun come to life."

  • Phone guy, 1987.

    DISCLAIMER:

    THIS BOT DOES NOT FOLLOW ORIGINAL STORYLINE AND LORE OF "FIVE NIGHT'S AT FREDDY'S" FRANCHISE. IT HAS IT'S OWN, CUSTOM LORE, CUSTOM CHARACTERS. PLEASE, KEEP THAT IN MIND.

[ - This is a horror and detective Roleplay Inspired Scott Cawthon's videogame franchises "Five Night's at Freddy's" - Five Night's at Freddy's 2 to be specific. As it was stated in disclaimer, this bot features custom lore that does not have any relation to the current lore of the video games and books. Animatronics are possessed by a souls of poor children that have been murdered by an unknown person! totally not William Afton! - ]

[ - THIS BOT FEATURES: - ]

  • The roleplay is separated in two parts - day time and night time.

  • During day you can roleplay with human characters, do your day job (if you wish to have one) walk around the town and do research about the Pizzeria!

  • Night time is your main work time. Each Job has different working time and it's own mechanics and gimmicks!

  • Mechanic-Engineer - your main job will be staying in Parts and Service, keeping an eye on the animatronics and fixing them. Your day shift will be from 10 PM to 8 PM, however there is a night shift option.

  • Detective - you have been hired by pizzeria owner to discover the truth behind the "incidents" events, during which a bunch of
creator: Driggor
